title: BEM-865 queue runner paths
objective:
Run script:
"""
wf = Path('.github/workflows/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.yml')
text = wf.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if wf.exists() else ''
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem865_queue_runner_lines')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
count = 0
for i, line in enumerate(text.splitlines(), 1):
    low = line.lower()
    if any(tok in low for tok in ['workflow_dispatch', 'queue', 'processed', 'results', 'pending', 'glob', 'path', 'github api', 'repos/', 'actions/workflows']):
        safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in line.strip())[:90]
        marker = outdir / (str(i).zfill(4) + '_' + safe + '.md')
        marker.write_text('# queue runner line\nLine: ' + str(i) + '\nText: ' + line + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
        changed_files.append(str(marker))
        count += 1
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_QUEUE_RUNNER_LINES_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-865 queue runner line scan\nWorkflow exists: ' + str(wf.exists()) + '\nMatches: ' + str(count) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('queue runner lines scanned: ' + str(count))
"""
No issue comments.
